episodes.title: Rep. Comer Speaks With Epstein Survivors Outside Former AG Bondi's Interview
episodes.description:
House Oversight Committee Chair James Comer (R-KY) spoke with Epstein survivors about Congress' response to allegations of misconduct in the Justice Department's handling of the Epstein files, outside the room where former Attorney General Pam Bondi was participating in a closed-door interview. 

https://www.c-span.org/program/news-conference/jeffrey-epstein-survivors-speak-to-reporters-ahead-of-pam-bondi-deposition/680077

episodes.title: Dean: "Why did you lie about your relationship with Epstein?"
episodes.description:
Rep. Madeleine Dean (D-PA) pressed Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. The secretary declined to comment, saying he would testify soon before the House Oversight Committee on the topic. Rep. Dean disagreed that this was sufficient, saying Secretary Lutnick would not be under oath or have his comments available to the American public during the closed-door House Oversight deposition. 

https://www.c-span.org/event/house-committee/commerce-secretary-howard-lutnick-testifies-on-2027-budget--us-economy/442423

episodes.title: Melania Trump: "The lies linking me to the disgraceful Jeffrey Epstein need to end today."
episodes.description:
First Lady Melania Trump gave a televised statement from the White House denying allegations that she was friends or otherwise connected with Jeffrey Epstein or his associate Ghislaine Maxwell beyond a casual acquaintanceship from living in the same cities. The First Lady also denied allegations that Mr. Epstein had introduced her to President Trump and called for Congress to give his victims a public hearing. https://www.c-span.org/program/white-house-event/first-lady-melania-trump-statement-on-alleged-relationship-with-jeffrey-epstein/677083

episodes.title: Attorney General Bondi After Closed-Door Briefing on Epstein Investigation
episodes.description:
Attorney General Bondi speaks to reporters after Democratic lawmakers walked out of a closed-door briefing on the Epstein Investigation. She says she will "follow the law" but does not say she would follow the subpoena to testify under oath. https://www.c-span.org/program/news-conference/attorney-general-bondi-speaks-to-reporters-after-house-oversight-committee-briefing/675891

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton: "I just finished testifying...I never met Jeffrey Epstein."
episodes.description:
Hillary Clinton: "I just finished testifying. I answered every one of their questions as fully as I could...I never met Jeffrey Epstein, never had any connection or communication with him...I knew Ghislaine Maxwell casually, as an acquaintance…It was disappointing that they refused to hold a public hearing."

https://www.c-span.org/event/news-conference/oversight-committee-members-on-hillary-clinton-deposition/440775

episodes.title: Rep. Jasmine Crockett on Epstein files: "I'm not saying that the President is a pedophile. But..."
episodes.description:
Rep. Jasmine Crockett (D-TX) to Attorney General Pam Bondi on Epstein files: "I'm not saying that the President is a pedophile. But there is a lot of evidence in these files that suggests that he's very close friends with a lot of men who are pedophiles."

Full video here: https://www.c-span.org/program/house-committee/attorney-general-pam-bondi-testifies-before-house-judiciary-committee-part-1/673053

episodes.title: Attorney General Pam Bondi Refuses to Apologize to Epstein Survivors in Hearing Room
episodes.description:
Rep. Pramila Jayapal (D-WA) spars with Attorney General Pam Bondi on DOJ treatment of Epstein survivors: "Attorney General Bondi…Will you turn to them now and apologize for what your Department of Justice has put them through?"
 
Bondi: "I'm not going to get in the gutter for her theatrics."

Full video here: https://www.c-span.org/event/house-committee/attorney-general-pam-bondi-testifies-before-house-judiciary-committee/440226

episodes.title: Rep. Ro Khanna (R-CA) on Epstein Files
episodes.description:
Rep. Ro Khanna (R-CA) on the Epstein files: "There were six wealthy, powerful men that the DOJ hid for no apparent reason…Why did it take Thomas Massie and I…going to the Justice Department to get these six men's identities to become public?" episodes.title: Rep. Raskin on Epstein Files, Department of Justice Cover-up and Redactions
episodes.description:
Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-MD) spoke to the media on after his own review of unredacted files held by the Justice Department related to its investigation of convicted financier and sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. He says, "about half of all the documents have not been released yet...the Department of Justice has been in a cover-up mode for many months and has been trying to sweep the entire thing under the rug." Full video here: https://www.c-span.org/program/news-conference/rep-jamie-raskin-news-conference-on-epstein-files/673155

episodes.title: Rep. Lieu Says Epstein files Have Allegations of Trump Raping & Threatening to Kill Children
episodes.description:
Rep. Ted Lieu (D-CA): "Why are Republicans are so interested in the Bill and Hillary Clinton it's because they're trying to distract from the fact that Donald Trump is in the Epstein files thousands & thousands of times. In those files, there's highly disturbing allegations of Donald Trump raping children, of Donald Trump threatening to kill children." Full video here: https://www.c-span.org/program/news-conference/house-democratic-caucus-leaders-hold-news-conference/672770

episodes.title: "I had nothing to do with Jeffrey Epstein."
episodes.description:
Q: "Why wait for Congress to release the Epstein files? Why not just do it now?"

President Trump on Jamal Khashoggi: "It's not the question that I mind. It's you attitude...I had nothing to do with Jeffrey Epstein...I thought he was a sick pervert."

Full video here: https://www.c-span.org/event/white-house-event/president-trump-meets-with-saudi-crown-prince/438271

episodes.title: "You might be in a cult!"
episodes.description:
Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA): "My colleagues, none of this today that you are bringing makes sense; your inconsistencies, your hypocrisy, your sycophancy unless you are in a cult.
